scripts.dev: npm run build -w shared && concurrently -n SHARED,BACKEND,FRONTEND -c yellow,cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w shared" "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend
scripts.check: npm run build -w shared && npm run check -w shared && npm run check -w backend && npm run check -w frontend
scripts.pipeline:prod: npm run ingest:osm && npm run ingest:foodbanks && npm run normalize && npm run coverage:build && npm run enrich:foodbanks
